title: OTel flight-recorder mapping + one-call bundle export
manager: The tape is already the telemetry — an OpenTelemetry mapping makes machines native to any observability stack (a transition is a span, val deltas are attributes, a machine or system is a resource), plus a one-call export of a repro-bundle per trace window. This means a machine's production behavior shows up in Datadog or Honeycomb like any other service, and any interesting window can be exported as a reproducible bundle for offline debugging.
cs: OTel mapping (transition=span/event, val deltas=attrs, machine/system=resource) + one-call repro-bundle export per trace window; the flight recorder; makes machines observability-native.
